Quick guide

Read the email carefully, check the sender, and choose the correct action.

Phishing Email Simulator

Practice identifying suspicious emails in a safe environment.

From: Subject:

Phishing Detection Tips

  • Verify sender addresses carefully.
  • Look for urgent or threatening language.
  • Hover over links before clicking.
  • Never share passwords or personal details by email.

Why this matters

Phishing is one of the most common ways attackers gain access to sensitive accounts and systems. Practicing with examples helps build safer habits.
